title: Abel's Blood.
content:
Speak, did the blood of Abel cry
    To God for vengeance? Yes, say I,
    Ev'n as the sprinkled blood called on
    God for an expiation.
meaning:
"Abel's Blood." is a quintessential example of Robert Herrick's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
